title: vaccinium cordifolium
intro: Vaccinium cordifolium, also known as mountain cranberry or American mountain cranberry, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the heath family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vaccinium cordifolium include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Vaccinium cordifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
